title: A TV Star Found in Thailand
summary: Jordan Wright was a man from Britain who was on TV shows like The Only Way Is Essex. He was found dead in a ditch in Thailand in March. A coroner in Essex is looking into what happened. His body was brought back to Essex. Friends from TV shows shared sad messages online. The coroner said sorry to his family. People are waiting for more tests to understand why he died. Jordan had been sharing fun videos from Thailand before he died.

keywords.explanation: a long hole in the ground

questions.question: Who was found dead in Thailand?
What are people waiting for to understand the death?
What did Jordan share online before he died?
Where was Jordan's body brought back to?

background_read: Jordan Wright was a person who appeared on reality TV shows in Britain. He was found dead in Thailand, and a coroner is investigating. This story helps us learn about how sad events are reported and how people show support online.
Article_Structure: WHO: Jordan Wright, a former British reality TV star
WHAT: He was found dead in a drainage ditch in Thailand
WHERE: In Thailand, specifically in Phuket province
WHY: A coroner is investigating to understand the cause of death

perspectives.description: Many people feel sad and share condolences for Jordan's death.
